header: Features that feels ready to ship
subheadline: Frames product value with strong hierarchy, modern media support, and scannable details for every viewport.

feature_items.title: Seats
feature_items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

feature_items.title: Workspace storage
feature_items.description: A sharp, production-minded features using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so product teams can show value with clean, scannable sections.

feature_items.title: Priority support
feature_items.description: Built to show the features with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

feature_items.title: SSO and roles
feature_items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this features easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
